## Architecture Boundaries

<!-- Define what requires human approval vs. what agents can decide autonomously.
     This prevents agents from making unauthorized structural changes. -->

### Requires Human Approval

<!-- Changes that are too impactful for autonomous execution. -->

- Adding new external dependencies
- Changing database schema
- Modifying authentication or authorization logic
- Altering public API contracts
- ...

### Autonomous (Agent May Decide)

<!-- Changes agents can make without asking. -->

- Adding tests
- Refactoring within a module's boundaries
- Fixing lint or type errors
- Updating internal documentation
- ...
